expected_properties: Result r equals a + b for ADD opcode
Carry flag set when unsigned overflow occurs
Overflow flag set when signed overflow occurs
additional_cases.goal: Exercise ADD operation with varied operand patterns
notes: Focus on signed vs unsigned overflow detection
stimulus_intent: Apply ADD opcode with random and edge operand values

expected_properties: Output r is high-impedance (z) when aluc is undefined
additional_cases.goal: Verify module response to undefined opcode
notes: Uses opcode 6'b111111 not defined in spec
stimulus_intent: Drive aluc with an undefined value while providing arbitrary a,b

expected_properties: Result matches arithmetic definition for given opcode
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Validate functional mapping for typical opcodes
notes: Preserves original intent while adding operation specificity
stimulus_intent: Apply a representative set of opcodes (ADD, SUB, AND, OR) with random operands
timing_assumptions: Do not infer internal state or undocumented storage

expected_properties: Boundary values (0x0, 0xFFFFFFFF) produce correct zero, carry, overflow, and sign flags
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Validate boundary handling for arithmetic and shift operations
notes: Ensures correct flag behavior at extreme operand and shift amounts
stimulus_intent: Drive min/max operand values and extreme shift amounts (0 and 31)
timing_assumptions: Do not infer internal state or undocumented storage
